list.vod_blurb: The plot revolves around British aristocratic detective Inspector Thomas Lynley and his working-clas
list.vod_content: The plot revolves around British aristocratic detective Inspector Thomas Lynley and his working-class partner, Sergeant Barbara Havers, as they solve crimes interwoven with social issues. As the 8th Earl of Asherton, Lynley is from the highest aristocrati
